'''Mintinee''' was the [[Clan mother/Legends|clan mother]] of one of the tribes of [[Witches of Dathomir|Dathomiri Witches]].<ref name="GatORW" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Mintinee is first mentioned in ''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''. She is stated as being the leader of the [[Great Canyon Clan]]. Later in the text it states she was the leader of the [[Misty Falls Clan]].<ref name="GatORW" />
